name: @pryzm/crash-reporter
description: PRYZM 2 — crash + uncaught-error reporter (S48 D3). Public surface is `getCrashReporter(): Promise<CrashReporter>` — the impl is loaded lazily so the editor's first-paint chunk has zero crash-reporter bytes. Default is `NoopCrashReporter`; `OtelLinkedReporter` enriches every report with the active OTel trace ID per spec line 716. Real Sentry/GlitchTip backend binding deferred to S48 D9 launch.
